div.div: Something went wrong. Please try again.

div.t-att-style: 'border-left-color:' + ('#ef4444' if notice.notice_type == 'emergency' else '#f59e0b' if notice.notice_type == 'event' else '#06b6d4' if notice.notice_type == 'promotion' else '#1a73e8')

span.t-att-style: 'background:' + ('#fee2e2;color:#991b1b' if notice.notice_type == 'emergency' else '#fef9c3;color:#854d0e' if notice.notice_type == 'event' else '#e0f2fe;color:#0369a1' if notice.notice_type == 'promotion' else '#eff6ff;color:#1e40af')

span.t-att-class: 'active' if booking.state in ['confirmed','approved'] else 'cancelled' if booking.state == 'cancelled' else 'pending'
'active' if dp.state == 'active' else 'cancelled' if dp.state in ['expired','cancelled'] else 'pending'
'active' if invite.state == 'active' else 'cancelled' if invite.state in ['expired','cancelled'] else 'pending'
'active' if party.state == 'active' else 'info' if party.state in ['configured'] else 'pending'
'active' if cab.state == 'active' else 'cancelled' if cab.state == 'cancelled' else 'pending'

div.t-att-style: 'border-left:4px solid ' + ('#f59e0b' if visitor.state == 'pending' else '#22c55e' if visitor.state == 'approved' else '#ef4444' if visitor.state == 'rejected' else '#06b6d4')

i.t-att-class: 'fa ' + ('fa-user' if visitor.visitor_type == 'guest' else 'fa-shopping-bag' if visitor.visitor_type == 'delivery' else 'fa-wrench' if visitor.visitor_type == 'service' else 'fa-taxi' if visitor.visitor_type == 'cab' else 'fa-user-circle')

span.t-att-class: 'pending' if visitor.state == 'pending' else 'active' if visitor.state == 'approved' else 'cancelled'
'info' if perm.state == 'active' else 'used' if perm.state == 'used' else 'pending'

div.p: You are not associated with any property yet. Please contact your administrator.

i.t-att-class: 'fa fa-2x ' + ('fa-user' if visitor.visitor_type == 'guest' else 'fa-shopping-bag' if visitor.visitor_type == 'delivery' else 'fa-wrench' if visitor.visitor_type == 'service' else 'fa-taxi' if visitor.visitor_type == 'cab' else 'fa-user-circle')

span.t-att-class: 'pending' if visitor.state == 'pending' else 'active' if visitor.state == 'approved' else 'cancelled'

div.div: Show this code at the gate for entry

span.t-att-style: 'background:' + ('#fee2e2;color:#991b1b' if notice.notice_type == 'emergency' else '#fef9c3;color:#854d0e' if notice.notice_type == 'event' else '#e0f2fe;color:#0369a1' if notice.notice_type == 'promotion' else '#eff6ff;color:#1e40af')

a.onclick: return confirm('Are you sure you want to cancel this pre-approval?');

div.div: This is a Paid Amenity. An invoice will be generated after booking.

button.class: btn btn-warning text-dark w-100 font-weight-bold py-3 mt-2

div.class: p-3 bg-warning text-dark mt-3 rounded-lg font-weight-bold

a.class: btn btn-success w-100 py-3 mt-3 font-weight-bold
btn btn-danger w-100 py-3 mt-4 font-weight-bold

img.style: width: 100%; max-height: 250px; object-fit: cover; border-top-left-radius: 24px; border-top-right-radius: 24px;
